mapper.select: SELECT user_phone FROM user_datas WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT * FROM (SELECT *,MAX(buy_at) FROM user_datas GROUP BY user_no) a
AND user_id LIKE CONCAT('%',#{search_text},'%')
AND user_phone LIKE CONCAT('%',#{search_text},'%')
AND user_grade LIKE CONCAT('%','1등급','%')
AND user_grade LIKE CONCAT('%','2등급','%')
AND user_grade LIKE CONCAT('%','3등급','%')
AND user_grade LIKE CONCAT('%','4등급','%')
AND user_grade LIKE CONCAT('%','5등급','%')
AND buy_at <= DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL -3 DAY)
AND buy_at <= DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL -7 DAY)
AND buy_at <= DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL -15 DAY)
AND buy_at BETWEEN CAST(CONCAT(REPLACE(#{select_date},'.','-'),' 00:00:00') AS DATETIME) AND CAST(CONCAT(REPLACE(#{select_date},'.','-'),' 23:59:59') AS DATETIME)
LIMIT #{start} , #{page_row}
